description: Renders one feature card with optional icon and title.
uiDescription: Shows a rounded card with a small visual icon, a short title, and concise supporting text.
generationNotes: Keep the title short and the body to one sentence or a tiny bullet list.
Use the icon for quick visual scanning, but avoid complex decorative content.
useCases: Product features, customer benefits, module descriptions, and capability highlights.
Avoid using it for paragraphs longer than a few lines.

fewShotExamples.intent: Describe one feature in a product grid.
